chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3572 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 27.03.2025 Mr. Raja Rashid Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh This petition is pending since 27.07.2023 and remains listed for orders as to maintainability ever since. On the last date the following order was passed: “It appears that the petitioner seeks a writ essentially against a private person. He shall first satisfy the Court as to the maintainability of the petition” Today, once again upon being confronted learned counsel remains unable to assist. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
